title: ‎Mother who publicly claimed vaccines killed her 18-month-old twins is now accused of murdering them, with prosecutors alleging she suffocated both children
summary_full: An Idaho woman faces murder charges for allegedly suffocating her infant twins. Andrea Shaw had previously claimed routine childhood vaccines caused their deaths. Prosecutors allege she deliberately killed Dallas and Tyson in May 2025. Shaw was a prominent figure in the anti-vaccine movement following the tragedy. Her defense plans to argue vaccine complications while she awaits trial.
